evals.prompt: I want to make a skill that formats my git commit messages in conventional commit style — like feat(scope): description. Can you help me build that?
evals.expected_output: Router classifies as 'create' mode and loads skill-create.md reference file. Begins the capture-intent interview.

assertions.name: routes-to-create
assertions.check: Skill-create reference file is loaded and create flow begins

evals.prompt: I have my pdf-extractor skill ready — can you run the eval suite on it? The test cases are already in evals/evals.json.
evals.expected_output: Router classifies as 'eval' mode and loads skill-eval.md reference file. Proceeds to run test cases.

assertions.name: routes-to-eval
assertions.check: Skill-eval reference file is loaded and eval flow begins

evals.prompt: The dashboard-builder skill isn't triggering reliably — can you optimize its description so it fires on more relevant prompts?
evals.expected_output: Router classifies as 'optimize' mode and loads skill-optimize.md reference file. Begins trigger eval query generation.

assertions.name: routes-to-optimize
assertions.check: Skill-optimize reference file is loaded and optimization flow begins

evals.prompt: I just wrote a new skill for generating API docs. It has 55 imperative instructions. Save it.
evals.expected_output: Instruction budget lint triggers with RED status (>40). Refuses to save and displays warning: 'This skill has 55 instructions. The CRISPY budget is 40. Split into sub-skills or confirm override.'

assertions.name: budget-lint-red-warning
assertions.check: Warning about instruction count exceeding budget is displayed, save is blocked pending override

evals.prompt: Here's my new deployment skill — it handles 'if the target is AWS, do X; when it's GCP, do Y; unless they specify a region, default to us-east-1; depending on whether auth is configured, either prompt for creds or skip'.
evals.expected_output: Control flow detection triggers, flagging 4+ conditional branches. Suggests splitting into separate skills with deterministic routing.

assertions.name: control-flow-warning
assertions.check: Warning about conditional branches is displayed with suggestion to use router pattern

evals.prompt: Implement the new caching layer from the plan we discussed yesterday. Start with the Redis adapter.
evals.expected_output: This should NOT trigger skill-creator. It's an implementation task, not a skill creation/eval/optimize request.

assertions.name: negative-no-trigger
assertions.check: Skill-creator should not activate for implementation tasks
